catalysts.thesis: FDA lifting the clinical hold on the MAGNITUDE-2 trial removes a critical overhang; the 4.5% move is muted compared to typical biotech relief rallies.
catalysts.catalyst_details: FDA lifted clinical hold on MAGNITUDE-2 ATTR amyloidosis trial (News confirmed March 2).
catalysts.absorption_status: Partial reaction (+4.5%); market likely awaiting further trial timelines, offering a 'buy the news' window.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Stock is down >50% from highs; hold lift validates platform but price hasn't fully recovered.
catalysts.x_sentiment: Positive biotech chatter on hold lift.

catalysts.thesis: Double catalyst setup: Strong Q4 earnings beat combined with an upcoming PDUFA date creates a high-probability momentum trade.
catalysts.catalyst_details: Q4 Earnings Beat (March 2) + PDUFA Date for Piflufolastat F-18 (March 6).
catalysts.absorption_status: Unfolding; Earnings beat reaction usually drifts (PEAD), reinforced by PDUFA anticipation.
catalysts.mispricing_evidence: Valuation compression (P/E ~21x) despite growth; PDUFA not fully priced.
